solutions.title: Solution (Ne0n25)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
=
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val n
=
readLine
()!!.
toInt
()
val a
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
val b
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
var
ans
=
-
1
var
ans_shift
=
-
1
for
(
shift
in
0
until
n
)
{
var
res
=
1e9
.
toInt
()
for
(
i
in
0
until
n
)
res
=
Math
.
min
(
res
,
Math
.
abs
(
a
[
i
]
-
b
[(
i
+
shift
)
%
n
]))
if
(
res
>
ans
)
{
ans
=
res
			ans_shift
=
shift
}
}
println
(
IntArray
(
n
)
{
(
it
+
ans_shift
)
%
n
+
1
}.
joinToString
(
" "
))
}
